ddls:
CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "non_performance" TEXT /* Non-performance level description */,
  "basic" TEXT /* Basic level description */,
  "proficient" TEXT /* Proficient level description */,
  "distinguished" TEXT /* Distinguished level description */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criterion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criterion was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level (e.g., non-performance, basic, proficient, distinguished) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was last updated */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workforce_data" (
  "workforce_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workforce entry */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the employee */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workforce entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workforce entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workforce_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient outcome was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient outcome was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the patient outcome */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the patient outcome on the healthcare system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diversity_and_multiculturalism" (
  "diversity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diversity and multiculturalism entry */,
  "workforce_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workforce entry */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the criterion */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the level of analysis */,
  "patient_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diversity and multiculturalism entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diversity and multiculturalism entry was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diversity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_and_multiculturalism_patient_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_outcome_id") REFERENCES patient_outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_and_multiculturalism_workforce_id FOREIGN KEY ("workforce_id") REFERENCES workforce_data ("workforce_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_and_multiculturalism_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_and_multiculturalism_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruitment_and_retention" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the policy applies to */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was last updated */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the policy expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gaps" (
  "gap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gap */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy */,
  "gap_description" TEXT /* Description of the gap */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gap was identified */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gap was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the gap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gaps_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES recruitment_and_retention ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence_based_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "gap_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gap */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was proposed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the change */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Expected impact of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_based_changes_gap_id FOREIGN KEY ("gap_id") REFERENCES gaps ("gap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, healthcare professional) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., diversity and multiculturalism, recruitment and retention) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "recommendation_description" TEXT /* Description of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
